hero.title: Get premium benefits, and a one-time chance to win
hero.subtitle: Smart Energy Pay gives you immediate platinum benefits, and one optional chance to win significant monthly SEP rewards. Up to €300.000
hero.badge: Easy entry · Clear rules · Closing April 30, 2026

features.title: This starts with real-world benefits
features.subtitle: Getting a Smart Energy Pays Platinum account gives you access to tangible, immediate advantages — independent of the game outcome.
features.benefit1: Access to the Smart Energy Pay ecosystem
features.benefit2: Participation in the future of energy and finance
features.benefit3: Up to 25% discount on new BMW and Mercedes vehicles

game.title: The participation-based game
game.subtitle: Participants can join a one-time, participation-based game with real prizes.

mechanics.title: How it works
mechanics.step1: Open a Smart Energy Pays account
mechanics.step2: You swap €1000 to SEP, you get a ticket for every swap!
mechanics.step3: Winners are selected transparently in a live stream.
mechanics.step4: Regardless of outcome, you retain your platinum benefits.
mechanics.disclaimer: (Every €1000 bet = one additional chance to win — Maximum one prize per participant)

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Do I need to be a new client to participate?
faq.a1: No. Existing clients can participate as well. Everybody is welcome.
faq.q2: How many tickets can I get?
faq.a2: As many as you want. Each €1,000 swapped into $SEP counts as one entry.
faq.q3: Do I need a specific subscription to access benefits?
faq.a3: No. All subscriptions allow you to access the benefits.
faq.a4:
Up to €5,000 per month for 5 years.
Plus ecosystem benefits such as exclusive discounts and access perks.

footer.title: Participation window closes on
footer.subtitle: After this date: No new entries. The window closes once — for all.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Smart Energy Pays. All rights reserved.
